name: Almond Mushroom Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt the margarine.
2. Add onion, garlic, and mushrooms to the skillet. Cook until the vegetables are tender but not browned.
3. Stir in tarragon until it is softened.
4. Transfer the mixture to a food processor bowl.
5. Add lemon juice, soy sauce, white pepper, and cream cheese (if using) to the food processor.
6. Process the ingredients until they are smooth and well combined.
7. Spoon the pate into a serving bowl.
8. Garnish with slivered or finely chopped almonds, fresh parsley sprigs, pimiento strips, or sweet red pepper strips if desired.
Makes 1 1/2 cups.
Garnishes:
- Slivered or finely chopped almonds
- Fresh parsley sprigs
- Pimiento strips
- Sweet red pepper strips
Note: This recipe can be customized with different vegetables, herbs, and seasonings to suit your taste preferences. Serve with water crackers, thick slices of crusty French bread, thin slices of whole wheat bread, or unsalted whole wheat crackers. The pate can also be frozen for later use.
